title: バクシン！　模範ウマ娘！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of tryouts arrives, and there's excitement in the air as trainers
gather in hopes of scouting the latest and greatest in talented
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! A familiar face! It's nice to see you again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ready? I was BORN ready! No one's raring to go like me, the class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, my race is up next, so I must be off! Just TRY to keep up
with my astonishing speed! But beware... you might just be blinded by
my EXCELLENCE!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin! Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That was Sakura Bakushin O, right? Did she just say she's in the next
race? My data says she specializes in sprints...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: But next up is the long-distance race... What is she planning?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With furrowed brows, the other curious trainers and I look on as
Sakura Bakushin O's race begins...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O bursts out of the gates and takes the lead! She's
pulling away from the rest of the runners!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: There's more where that came from! Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Look at her go! With that speed, she might be the fastest
Umamusume on the track today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race has only just begun, and the crowd is going wild! An unusual
reaction to say the least, but after seeing Sakura Bakushin O, I
completely understand.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is she thinking?! She can't use that much power right out of
the gate! But... then again...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
What amazing speed! I've never seen someone start a race off like
this!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: If she can keep it up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a brief moment, even the veteran trainers have their eyes glued to
the track, the prospect of a new racing superstar filling them with
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners are rounding the fourth turn! Their actions from this point
on will decide the outcome of the race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin... Bakushiiin...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: S-Sakura Bakushin O is losing speed! Has her initial energy run dry?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Can't... keep... going... Must... slow... down.

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Sakura Bakushin O loses speed, the other Umamusume pick up
their pace, eventually leaving her in twelfth place...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Twelfth place?! TWELFTH! What a disgrace...
choice_data_list: You started out strong, too... What rotten luck.
You started out strong, too... What rotten luck.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No... Luck had nothing to do with it. The others really gave their all,
and it showed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nothing screams maturity like acknowledging your opponents'
strength! As expected of the dignified class representative!
choice_data_list: Uh... You saying that kinda ruins it...
Uh... You saying that kinda ruins it...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Ah, there she is. Sakura Bakushin O! I'd like to have a word with you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Would those words happen to be "I'm here to scout you"?! I was
wondering when you'd show up!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
W-well, that certainly saves me some time. You may not have won
today, but your speed really impressed me. I'd love to take you under
my wing.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I know you've got what it takes to dominate every short-distance race
out there! Together, we'll make you the best sprinter in the world!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'll be the best—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sprinter?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That's right... Is there a problem? Judging from that race, you're
clearly suited to shorter distances...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see, I see... Shorter distances, yes...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, but I must decline! Thank you for your interest in the
trainer position! Now... go back from whence you came!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! B-but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taken aback by her vehement dismissal, the trainer stands there for a
moment, before eventually shuffling away.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What a disappointment, but oh well! When one door closes, another is sure to open!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now then... What about you? You've seen what I can do, so surely you have something you'd like to say!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Or... Are you going to try to recruit me as a sprinter too?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If you have to think about it, then we both know the answer! As much
as I hate to do this, it's going to be a no from me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but I refuse to be limited to just sprints! NO WAY, NO
HOW!
choice_data_list: Why are you so hung up on this?
Why are you so hung up on this?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Because I am class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now I have a question for YOU! Can you name all the G1 races that
AREN'T sprints? Go!
choice_data_list:
Uh, the Japanese Derby, Tenno Sho, Arima
Kinen—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: STOP! Starting to get the picture?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's loads and LOADS of races out there! And I want to win all of
them, not just the short-distance ones!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Remember what I said the other day? I exist to be class
representative, and the class representative role exists for me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I want to be a model for ALL students to look up to!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And what type of runner do you think of when you hear that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A sprinter? A miler? A stayer? No, you don't think of just one. You
think of a runner who can do it all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And THAT is the kind of runner the class representative should be!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So if you'll excuse me, I have places to go, people to see! Bakushin!
Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can manage to fumble together a response, Sakura Bakushin
O is long gone...
